nasb.text: You have removed my acquaintances far from me; You have made me an object of loathing to them; I am shut up and cannot go out.

esv.text: You have caused my companions to shun me; you have made me a horror to them. I am shut in so that I cannot escape;

cnv.text: 你使我的知己都遠離我， 使我成為他們所厭惡的。 我被囚禁，不能外出。

ccb.text: 你使我众叛亲离，遭人唾弃。 我陷入困境，无路可逃。

csbs.text: 你使认识我的人远离我， 使我成为他们所憎恶的； 我被囚禁，不能出来。
